action.reasoning: Observation: best hidden score is the 6-epoch CLIP checkpoint with center-crop inference (0.434), while the current predict.py defaults to harmful TTA (0.400). CLIP strong training improved hidden generalization despite lower source val, so architectural diversity may help. Analysis: restore center-crop inference as default and add a DINOv2-base classifier using the cached pretrained model; DINO features may be less CLIP-specific and provide a useful alternative. Decision: update model/predict/train to support DINOv2 and checkpoint normalization metadata, train a 4-epoch DINOv2 baseline with strong augmentation and balanced sampling, then submit immediately to measure hidden performance.
